title: Tophteh #8613
definition:
Tophet = "place of fire"

 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom
    south of Jerusalem
    1a) same as \\08612\\
nasbUsage:

 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom
    south of Jerusalem
    1a) same as \\08612\\
